meaning: 登比郡[英国威尔士原郡名]
examples: Denbighshire council said the south of the county had received an unprecedented amount of snowfall.
Also in Denbighshire, the A525 Nant-y-Garth Pass and the A542 Horseshoe Pass remained shut.
However, Denbighshire council leader Hugh Evans said questions about the flood's cause remain unanswered.
